themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. themes.label: Kingdom

Commentary leans on "The period of Judges (approximately 1375-1050 BC) was characterized by tribal confederation w...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".
